<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡八幡宮]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡八幡宮]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡八幡宮]]

'''Yawata Hachimangū''' (八幡八幡宮)

* Common name for {{ill|Ichisha Hachimangū of Kōzuke Province|ja|上野國一社八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisha Hachimangū of Kōzuke Province|1=Kōzuke-no-kuni Issha Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360309}}.
* Common name for {{ill|Ichisha Hachimangū of Shimotsuke Province|ja|下野國一社八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichisha Hachimangū of Shimotsuke Province|1=Shimotsuke-no-kuni Issha Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11361384}}.

{{disambiguation}}


{{translated page|ja|八幡八幡宮|version=59860565|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:八幡八幡宮]]

<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Yawata Hachimangū--><!--Yawata Hachimangū--><!--Yawata Hachimangū-->


<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{wikidata link|Q11390919}}

[[Category:Disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]]
